title: FLISSA Floating Fishing Net, Foldable & Extendable Fishing Landing Net, Fishing Pond Net with Durable PVC Coated Mesh, Telescopic Fishing Net for Catching Fish, Crap, Trout
features: Foldable Design: The handle folds 180° by simply pulling back the buckle. With a compact folded length of just 42.5 cm, it's easy to store in a boat cabin or car trunk. Lightweight and space-saving, this folding landing net is ideal for anglers on the go

Telescopic Handle: The fishing net can be extended from 81 cm to 99.5 cm, allowing flexible length adjustment to suit different fishing needs. Made of durable aluminum alloy, the pole is sturdy and built to last. It also features a black EVA grip that provides a secure and anti-slip hold

Durable & Fish-Friendly Mesh: The PVC-coated net offers excellent resistance to tearing, abrasion, and corrosion. It’s gentle on fish and allows for easy hook removal. This extendable fishing net measures 39 × 31 cm with a depth of 25 cm and can hold up to 4.5 kg

Floating Design: The rim of the fishing net is lined with EVA foam padding to keep it afloat. A safety buckle clips securely to your gear, allowing quick and safe access without the worry of the net sinking or drifting away

Wide Application: This fish net is perfect for catching a variety of fish and can be used on boats, kayaks, and canoes, as well as in streams, rivers, ponds, or even the ocean—suitable for all kinds of fishing and outdoor needs
